name: Crippling Comeuppance
additional_info: 30 second cooldown. For every point of Agility below 100, Crippling Comeuppance's duration is reduced by 0.1 seconds, having a minimum duration of 12.5 seconds at 75 Agility.
desc: Landing Revenge puts your opponent's Mobility slot Mantras on CD and applies Sluggish to PvE enemies for 15s.
